name: Roaz
street_level_visibility: Humans remain primary, while Half-Elves, Elves, and Gnomes align with Roazian law, industry, and anti-magic technical culture.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Roaz should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
